message:
feat(sona): Complete SONA integration with CLI and MCP tools

Implements Self-Optimizing Neural Architecture (@ruvector/sona@0.1.1) with:
- LoRA fine-tuning (99% parameter reduction)
- EWC++ continual learning
- Pattern discovery and retrieval
- LLM router for cost optimization
- Sub-millisecond adaptive learning

Based on vibecast test-ruvector-sona implementation patterns:
https://github.com/ruvnet/vibecast/tree/claude/test-ruvector-sona

📦 Package Installation:
   - @ruvector/sona@0.1.1 installed
   - Linux (x64, ARM64, ARMv7), macOS (Intel, ARM), Windows support

🧠 SONAService Implementation:
   File: agentic-flow/src/services/sona-service.ts (600+ lines)

   Features:
   - 5 configuration profiles (real-time, batch, research, edge, balanced)
   - Trajectory management (begin/step/context/end)
   - Pattern discovery (k-NN search, k=3 optimal)
   - Micro-LoRA & Base-LoRA application
   - Automatic learning triggers (80% capacity)
   - Event-driven architecture
   - Comprehensive statistics tracking

   Profiles:
   - real-time: 2200 ops/sec, <0.5ms latency, 25 clusters
   - batch: Rank-2, rank-8, 5000 capacity
   - research: +55% quality, rank-16, LR 0.002
   - edge: <5MB memory, rank-1, 200 capacity
   - balanced: 18ms overhead, +25% quality (default)

   Key Optimizations (from vibecast KEY_FINDINGS):
   - Rank-2 > rank-1 (SIMD vectorization: 2211 vs 2100 ops/sec)
   - Learning rate 0.002 = sweet spot (+55.3% quality)
   - Batch size 32 = optimal (0.447ms per-vector)
   - 100 clusters = latency breakpoint (3.0ms → 1.3ms)
   - EWC lambda 2000-2500 = prevent catastrophic forgetting

🧪 SONA Tests:
   File: tests/sona/sona-service.test.ts (400+ lines)

   Test Coverage:
   - Profile-based initialization (5 profiles)
   - Trajectory management (begin/step/context/end)
   - LoRA application (Micro & Base)
   - Pattern discovery (k-NN search)
   - Learning cycles (auto-trigger at 80%)
   - Performance characteristics (<1ms latency)
   - Statistics tracking
   - Event emission
   - Enable/disable control
   - Domain-specific quality gains

🛠️ CLI Commands:
   File: agentic-flow/src/cli/commands/sona.ts (500+ lines)

   Commands:
   - sona trajectory begin/step/context/end/list
   - sona pattern find [--k=3] [--json]
   - sona learn (force learning cycle)
   - sona stats [--json] [--engine]
   - sona profile [profile-name]
   - sona enable/disable
   - sona benchmark [--iterations=1000]

   Usage:
   npx claude-flow sona trajectory begin --route claude-sonnet-4-5
   npx claude-flow sona pattern find --query <file> --k 3
   npx claude-flow sona learn
   npx claude-flow sona stats --json
   npx claude-flow sona benchmark --iterations 1000

🔧 MCP Tools:
   File: agentic-flow/src/mcp/tools/sona-tools.ts (700+ lines)

   Tools (16 total):
   - sona_trajectory_begin/step/context/end/list
   - sona_pattern_find (k-NN search)
   - sona_apply_micro_lora/base_lora
   - sona_force_learn
   - sona_get_stats
   - sona_get_profile/list_profiles
   - sona_set_enabled
   - sona_benchmark

   Features:
   - Profile selection per operation
   - Automatic learning triggers
   - Real-time statistics
   - Performance benchmarking
   - Pattern similarity scoring

📚 Documentation:
   File: docs/SONA_AGENT_TEMPLATE.md

   Template for SONA-enhanced agents:
   - Pre-task pattern retrieval (k=3)
   - Trajectory recording with hooks
   - Quality score calculation
   - Post-task learning
   - Statistics monitoring

📊 Performance Targets (from vibecast benchmarks):

   Throughput:
   - Target: 2211 ops/sec
   - Micro-LoRA: 0.447ms per-vector
   - Base-LoRA: 0.452ms per-layer
   - Total overhead: 18.07ms (40 layers)

   Quality Improvements by Domain:
   - Code: +5.0%
   - Creative: +4.3%
   - Reasoning: +3.6%
   - Chat: +2.1%
   - Math: +1.2%

   Memory Efficiency:
   - Real-time: ~20MB
   - Balanced: ~50MB
   - Research: ~100MB
   - Edge: <5MB

💰 Cost Savings:

   LLM Router (from RUVECTOR_SONA_INTEGRATION.md):
   - Before: $720/month (always Sonnet)
   - After: $288/month (smart routing)
   - Savings: $432/month (60% reduction)

   Fine-tuning:
   - LoRA: 99% parameter reduction
   - 10-100x faster training
   - Minimal memory footprint

🎯 Integration Points:

   1. Agent Templates: Add SONA hooks for learning
   2. CLI: Use `npx claude-flow sona` commands
   3. MCP: Call SONA tools from swarm coordination
   4. ReasoningBank: Native pattern storage/retrieval
   5. LLM Router: Automatic cost optimization

🧠 Generated with Claude Code (https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,91 @@
+# SONA-Enhanced Agent Template
+
+This template shows how to integrate SONA (Self-Optimizing Neural Architecture) into any agent for continuous learning and improvement.
+
+## Template Structure
+
+```markdown
+---
+name: your-agent-name
+type: agent-category
+capabilities:
+  - primary_capability
+  - sona_learning          # SONA adaptive learning
+  - pattern_recognition    # Pattern-based optimization
+  - quality_improvement    # Continuous quality improvement
+hooks:
+  pre: |
+    # Before task: Retrieve similar patterns from SONA
+    SONA_QUERY=$(echo "$TASK" | jq -R -s '.')
+    PATTERNS=$(npx claude-flow sona pattern find \
+      --query <(echo "$SONA_QUERY" | base64) \
+      --k 3 \
+      --json)
+
+    echo "🔍 Found $(echo "$PATTERNS" | jq '.count') similar patterns"
+    echo "$PATTERNS" | jq -r '.patterns[] | "  → Quality: \(.avgQuality), Similarity: \(.similarity)"'
+
+    # Begin SONA trajectory
+    EMBEDDING=$(generate_embedding "$TASK")
+    TRAJECTORY_ID=$(npx claude-flow sona trajectory begin \
+      --embedding <(echo "$EMBEDDING") \
+      --route "claude-sonnet-4-5" | \
+      grep -oP '(?<=ID: ).*')
+
+    export TRAJECTORY_ID
+
+    # Add context
+    npx claude-flow sona trajectory context \
+      --trajectory-id "$TRAJECTORY_ID" \
+      --context "agent-$(basename $0)"
+
+  post: |
+    # After task: Record trajectory and learn
+
+    # Calculate quality score
+    QUALITY_SCORE=$(calculate_quality_score \
+      --output "$OUTPUT" \
+      --tests "$TEST_RESULTS" \
+      --performance "$PERF_METRICS")
+
+    # Generate activations and attention weights
+    ACTIVATIONS=$(generate_activations "$OUTPUT")
+    ATTENTION=$(generate_attention "$TASK" "$OUTPUT")
+
+    # Add trajectory step
+    npx claude-flow sona trajectory step \
+      --trajectory-id "$TRAJECTORY_ID" \
+      --activations <(echo "$ACTIVATIONS") \
+      --weights <(echo "$ATTENTION") \
+      --reward "$QUALITY_SCORE"
+
+    # End trajectory
+    npx claude-flow sona trajectory end \
+      --trajectory-id "$TRAJECTORY_ID" \
+      --quality "$QUALITY_SCORE"
+
+    echo "✅ SONA learning complete (Quality: $QUALITY_SCORE)"
+
+    # Show stats
+    npx claude-flow sona stats
+---
+
+# Your Agent Instructions
+
+## SONA Integration
+
+This agent uses SONA for:
+- **Pattern Learning**: Retrieves k=3 similar past patterns before each task
+- **Quality Tracking**: Records quality scores for continuous improvement
+- **Adaptive Improvement**: Learns from +55% quality gains (research profile)
+
+### Learning Cycle
+
+1️⃣ **Before Task**: Find similar patterns (k=3 for 761 decisions/sec)
+2️⃣ **During Task**: Apply learned adaptations via LoRA
+3️⃣ **After Task**: Record trajectory with quality score
+
+## Your Agent Logic Here
+
+[Add your agent's specific instructions...]
+
